tools.name: resolve-library-id
tools.description: Resolves package/product name to Context7-compatible library ID. Returns matching libraries with name, description, code snippets count, source reputation, benchmark score, and versions. Must call before 'Query Documentation' unless user provides library ID.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Question or task description used to rank results by relevance

tools.name: query-docs
tools.description: Retrieves and queries up-to-date documentation and code examples from Context7 for any programming library or framework. Must call 'Resolve Context7 Library ID' first unless user explicitly provides library ID.
